description_1to2_sentences: A classic stir-fried noodle dish with a sweet, sour, and savory tamarind sauce. Often served with shrimp, tofu, peanuts, and bean sprouts.
allergy_note_short: May contain peanuts, fish sauce, egg, and shellfish—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A bold hot and sour soup with shrimp, lemongrass, galangal, and kaffir lime. It's an iconic Thai broth known for its aromatic citrus kick.
allergy_note_short: Contains shrimp and fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A spicy green papaya salad from Isan, hand-pounded in a mortar with lime, chilies, and palm sugar. It's refreshingly crunchy and packs a flavor punch.
allergy_note_short: May contain peanuts, dried shrimp, and fish sauce—ask the staff.

dish_th: แกงเขียวหวาน
description_1to2_sentences: A fragrant, coconut-based curry made with green chilies, Thai basil, and baby eggplants. Despite its creamy look, it can be quite spicy.
allergy_note_short: Contains shrimp paste and fish sauce—ask the staff.

dish_th: แกงมัสมั่น
description_1to2_sentences: A mild, rich, and slightly sweet curry with influences from Persia and India. Usually features peanuts, potatoes, and tender meat.
allergy_note_short: Contains peanuts and fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A beloved street food stir-fry with holy basil, garlic, and chilies. Typically served with minced meat and a crispy fried egg on top.
allergy_note_short: May contain soy sauce and fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A creamy, mild chicken soup made with coconut milk and deep notes of galangal. It's much smoother and less spicy than Tom Yum.
allergy_note_short: Contains fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A simple yet delicious stir-fried jasmine rice with egg and garlic. Often served with a lime wedge and cucumber slices on the side.
allergy_note_short: Contains egg, soy sauce, and fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A thick, salty, and sweet red curry with a rich coconut base. It's often garnished with finely shredded kaffir lime leaves.
allergy_note_short: Contains peanuts, shrimp paste, and fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A spicy and tangy minced meat salad flavored with lime, toasted rice powder, and fresh mint. A staple of Northeastern Thai cuisine.
allergy_note_short: Contains fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A Northern Thai curried noodle soup with soft egg noodles and crispy fried noodles on top. It's creamy, slightly sweet, and aromatic.
allergy_note_short: Contains egg, shrimp paste, and fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: Stir-fried wide rice noodles with Chinese broccoli, egg, and dark soy sauce. It has a wonderful smoky "wok hei" flavor.
allergy_note_short: Contains egg, soy sauce, and shellfish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: Spicy stir-fried wide noodles with holy basil and lots of chilies. Despite the name, there is no alcohol in the actual dish.
allergy_note_short: Contains soy sauce and fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: Famous Thai-style fried chicken, often marinated with garlic and coriander root. Served extra crispy with a sweet chili sauce.
allergy_note_short: May contain wheat flour and soy sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: Grilled pork skewers marinated in coconut milk and palm sugar. A high-demand street snack usually eaten with sticky rice.
allergy_note_short: Contains soy sauce and fish sauce—ask the staff.

dish_th: ข้าวเหนียวมะม่วง
description_1to2_sentences: Thailand's most famous dessert featuring sweet sticky rice, ripe mango, and coconut cream. A perfect end to a spicy meal.
allergy_note_short: Frequently includes coconut and sesame seeds—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A tangy, orange-hued curry that uses tamarind for its signature sour taste. Typically contains fish and a variety of local vegetables.
allergy_note_short: Contains fish and shrimp paste—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: Whole fish stuffed with lemongrass and kaffir lime, coated in a thick salt crust and grilled. The salt keeps the meat incredibly moist.
allergy_note_short: Contains fish—ask the staff.

dish_th: ข้าวมันไก่
description_1to2_sentences: Thai version of chicken rice with poached chicken and fragrant rice cooked in broth. Served with a pungent ginger and chili sauce.
allergy_note_short: Sauce contains soybeans and ginger—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A refreshing salad of grilled beef slices tossed with lime juice, onions, and fresh Thai herbs. It's equal parts tangy and spicy.
allergy_note_short: Contains fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A versatile coconut curry using red chili paste as its base. Usually cooked with bamboo shoots, basil, and a choice of meat.
allergy_note_short: Contains shrimp paste and fish sauce—ask the staff.

dish_th: ผัดวุ้นเส้น
description_1to2_sentences: Chewy mung bean noodles stir-fried with egg, wood ear mushrooms, and crisp vegetables. A mild and comforting dish.
allergy_note_short: Contains egg, soy sauce, and fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A delicate mousse-like curry made from fish, coconut cream, and chili paste, steamed in banana leaf cups. Rich and aromatic.
allergy_note_short: Contains fish, egg, and shrimp paste—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: Springy fish patties seasoned with red curry paste and thinly sliced long beans. Typically served with a sweet cucumber radish dip.
allergy_note_short: Contains fish and egg—ask the staff.

dish_th: ผัดคะน้าหมูกรอบ
description_1to2_sentences: Slabs of crispy-skinned pork belly stir-fried with tender Chinese broccoli and oyster sauce. A savory and satisfying street staple.
allergy_note_short: Contains soy sauce and shellfish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: Succulent pork leg slow-braised in Chinese five-spice and soy sauce until it melts in your mouth. Served with pickled greens.
allergy_note_short: Contains soy sauce and egg—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: Deep-fried Thai omelette that is light, airy, and incredibly crispy at the edges. Best enjoyed with a dash of Sriracha sauce.
allergy_note_short: Contains egg and fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A notoriously spicy and pungent curry from the South, made with fermented fish innards. It's an acquired taste for the brave!
allergy_note_short: Contains fish—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: Grilled pork slices tossed with a spicy, herb-filled dressing and toasted rice powder. Named for the dripping juices of the meat.
allergy_note_short: Contains fish sauce—ask the staff.

dish_en: Dry Red Curry with Long Beans
dish_th: ผัดพริกขิง
description_1to2_sentences: A stir-fry that uses a concentrated red curry paste without coconut milk. It has a distinctive sweet, deep flavor.
allergy_note_short: Contains shrimp paste and fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A clear, herbal soup with tender pork ribs, flavored with lime and dried chili flakes. A refreshing and zingy Isan specialty.
allergy_note_short: Contains fish sauce—ask the staff.

dish_th: ข้าวเหนียว
description_1to2_sentences: The staple carbohydrate of the North and Northeast. It's hand-rolled into small balls to scoop up salads and grilled meats.
allergy_note_short: Generally safe, but ask about cross-contamination—ask the staff.

dish_th: ชะอมไข่ทอด
description_1to2_sentences: Deep-fried omelette stuffed with climbing wattle leaves, which have a unique nutty aroma. Usually served with a spicy shrimp paste dip.
allergy_note_short: Contains egg and fish sauce—ask the staff.

dish_th: น้ำพริกอ่อง
description_1to2_sentences: A mild Northern Thai dip made with minced pork and tomatoes. It tastes somewhat like a Thai version of Bolognese and is very accessible.
allergy_note_short: Contains soy sauce and fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: A rich, slow-cooked pork belly curry flavored with ginger and pickled garlic. It carries a delightful sweet and sour profile.
allergy_note_short: Contains peanuts and soy sauce—ask the staff.

dish_th: ผัดกะเพราหมูกรอบ
description_1to2_sentences: A variation of Pad Krapow using chunks of crispy-skinned pork belly. It's a favorite for its combination of spice and crunch.
allergy_note_short: Contains soy sauce and shellfish sauce—ask the staff.

dish_th: ปลาหมึกย่าง
description_1to2_sentences: Fresh squid charred over hot coals, served with a fiery green seafood sauce made of lime, garlic, and chilies.
allergy_note_short: Contains shellfish and fish sauce—ask the staff.

dish_th: ข้าวผัดสับปะรด
description_1to2_sentences: A vibrant fried rice often served inside a hollowed pineapple. It's sweet and savory, studded with cashews, raisins, and turmeric.
allergy_note_short: Contains cashews, egg, and fish sauce—ask the staff.

dish_th: ก๋วยเตี๋ยวเรือ
description_1to2_sentences: A dark, intense noodle soup traditionally served from boats. The broth is thickened with spices and a touch of blood for richness.
allergy_note_short: Contains soy sauce and fish sauce—ask the staff.

description_1to2_sentences: Succulent chicken marinated in lemongrass, garlic, and coriander root before being grilled. Best with sticky rice and papaya salad.
allergy_note_short: Contains soy sauce and fish sauce—ask the staff.
